# Incubator Product Card Template

## Purpose

Defines the ideal CyberMedica card for neonatal incubators and thermoregulation
systems.

## Required Sections

- Identity: manufacturer, model, variant, registration number, status.
- Classification: incubator type, neonatal/intensive care setting.
- Documents: RU, IFU/user manual, datasheet, service manual if available.
- Environmental control: temperature range, humidity, oxygen options.
- Monitoring and alarms: sensors, alarm groups, safety systems.
- Physical: dimensions, mattress area, access ports, weight.
- Electrical: power, battery if applicable, consumption.
- Accessories: scales, phototherapy, stands, modules.
- Cleaning/maintenance: disinfection, filters, service intervals.
- Warnings/contraindications: IFU-backed only.
- Evidence: source documents and locators.

## Critical Fields

- temperature control;
- humidity/oxygen features;
- alarm capability;
- access and dimensions;
- cleaning and maintenance;
- power.

## Safety

Do not publish neonatal safety claims without IFU/manual evidence and human
review.
